message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu

actor Administrator as Admin
boundary Dashboard_V as Dash
boundary Submenu_V as SubV
boundary EditSubmenu_V as EditV
control Admin_C as AdminC
control Menu_C as MenuC
entity Submenu_E as SubE

AdminC --> Dash : 1 load->view()
Dash --> Admin : 2 Halaman Dashboard
Admin -> Dash : 3 klik menu Submenu management
Dash -> MenuC : 4 Submenu()
MenuC -> SubE : 5
SubE --> MenuC : 6
MenuC --> SubV : 7 load->view()
SubV --> Admin : 8 Halaman Submenu management
Admin -> SubV : 9 klik tombol EditSubmenu
SubV -> MenuC : 10 EditSubmenu()
MenuC --> EditV : 11 load->view()
EditV --> Admin : 12 Halaman EditSubmenu
Admin -> EditV : 13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit

note left of Admin
Inputan Submenu
end note

EditV -> MenuC : 14 EditSubmenu()
MenuC -> SubE : 15

alt [isValid() case]
  SubE --> MenuC : 16 isValid()
  MenuC --> SubV : 17 load->view()
  SubV --> Admin : 18 Halaman Submenu
else [isInvalid() case]
  SubE --> MenuC : 19 isInvalid()
  MenuC --> EditV : 20 load->view()
  EditV --> Admin : 21 Halaman Edit Submenu
end

@enduml
```
